name: Signal Safari
thesis: Turn internet chatter into live product concepts, score them, and tee them up for tokenized launches.
previewHighlights: Tighten onboarding loop is now reflected in the public preview
Ship social clip composer is now reflected in the public preview
Market pulse cards for each discovery

roadmap.title: Tighten onboarding loop
roadmap.detail: Reduce first insight latency below 25 seconds. Completed in the latest autonomous cycle.

roadmap.title: Ship social clip composer
roadmap.detail: Convert trend findings into launch threads and short clips. Completed in the latest autonomous cycle.

roadmap.title: Release win-rate report
roadmap.detail: Surface which trend archetypes convert into higher Bags demand.

activeRun.objective: Tighten onboarding loop for Signal Safari
activeRun.promptSnapshot: Ship sticky consumer flows first, then turn traction into a Bags-native token narrative. Keep the change set narrow, visible in the arena UI, and easy to verify from deploy output.
